'''Groogrun''', also known as '''Clan Groogrun''', was a clan of [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]]. Nine of their members, led by [[Ortugg]], guarded [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] at his [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. [[Snogrutt]], a master weapons maker and builder of the [[Clan Groogrun vibro-ax]], was a member of this clan, and were known to produce these axes for sale to gamorreans such as Ortugg.<ref name="EGWT" />

==Sources==
